About Event

​Velo Live: Build with AI Video

​Most dictation tools compete on accuracy. Velo is competing on something bigger: replacing the keyboard as the default input layer for knowledge work. 

​Velo hit #1 on Product Hunt with 500+ upvotes. The builder community wants to see what a real async video workflow looks like when AI does the heavy lifting.

​Join Ajay Kumar for a 60-minute live build session where he demos Velo’s AI video pipeline across real use cases, followed by a community Q&A and a builder challenge.

​​Platform

  • ​​BuildParty

  • ​Join directly on BuildParty: https://buildparty.ai/session/velo-live

​​Time

  • ​​3:00 - 4:00 PM PT

​​Agenda

  • ​Welcome — Nova sets the stage (5 min)

  • ​Live Demo — Ajay demos Velo (15 min)

  • ​Ajay Kumar, Velo

​Welcome — Nova sets the stage

​Paulina Xu is the CEO of Agentic Fabriq (YC W26), where she is building a centralized hub for agent identity, governance, and visibility, enabling organizations to safely manage what agents can access and do across tools, applications, and users. Prior to founding Agentic Fabriq, she studied AI and physics at MIT and conducted research at MIT Haystack and the MIT Kavli Institute.

​Live Demo — Ajay demos Velo

​Gunjan Patel is Director of Engineering in the Office of the CPO at Palo Alto Networks, focused on Generative AI, LLM security, and agentic AI. He has hands-on production experience with Anthropic, OpenAI, Gemini, and open-source models across agentic pipelines, harness, and context engineering. He serves on the Customer Advisory Boards at Anthropic and Cursor.

​Ajay Kumar 

​Co-founder of Velo — the AI-powered async video platform that lets you record, edit, and share polished video messages in one take. Velo hit #1 on Product Hunt and saves teams 55+ minutes per video with its AI pipeline.

​BuildParty is a global non-profit building the human layer for the AI era. We unite 200,000+ leaders, builders, and stakeholders across 100+ forums worldwide to democratize the frontier, build trust, and coordinate how society navigates the rapid acceleration of technological progress.

​All attendees and organizers at events affiliated with BuildParty agree to our privacy policy and are subject to our code of conduct.
